bird_dog.recommended_account_workflow: Upload or configure these signals first, then review BirdDog recommended accounts before adding to monitoring.
bird_dog.fallback_account_monitoring: If custom signal creation is unavailable, export top-scored accounts to BirdDog watchlists and pull alerts back into accounts.json.
